Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jacob Cutler, Esq, 310-552-2250 Knight Law Group for Plaintiff.
Wing Lu, Esq, 424-221-7400 Nelson Mullins Riley & Scarborough LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Cutler informs the court he submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Defendant AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted.
(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
